# Fitlabreviews

> Evidence-led supplement reviews for the Indian and global wellness market. Editorially independent, formula-first, scored on the Fitlab Scoring Protocol (FSP).

Fitlabreviews publishes independent supplement reviews, evidence-based ingredient profiles, brand assessments, and goal-matched buying guides. All content is produced by the Fitlab Research Team and independently scored using the Fitlab Scoring Protocol (FSP) — a five-pillar weighted framework covering formula integrity, label transparency, third-party verification, value efficiency, and practical quality.

## Key Sections

- [Home](https://fitlabreviews.com/): Featured reviews, ingredient highlights, goal guides
- [Reviews by Category](https://fitlabreviews.com/category): All supplement categories — protein powder, creatine, pre-workout, mass gainers, fat burners, vitamins, adaptogens, omega-3, sleep & recovery
- [Best-Of Guides](https://fitlabreviews.com/best): Ranked roundups per category with top pick and budget pick comparisons
- [Ingredient Research Index](https://fitlabreviews.com/ingredients): Evidence-based profiles for creatine monohydrate, whey protein, beta-alanine, caffeine, L-citrulline, ashwagandha, L-theanine, magnesium, HMB, BCAAs, vitamin D3, omega-3
- [Brand Directory](https://fitlabreviews.com/brands): Independent profiles for Optimum Nutrition, MyProtein, MuscleBlaze, AS-IT-IS Nutrition, Dymatize, MusclePharm, NOW Sports, Garden of Life
- [Goal Guides](https://fitlabreviews.com/goals/muscle-gain): Evidence-matched stacks for muscle gain, weight loss, energy & focus, recovery & sleep
- [Methodology](https://fitlabreviews.com/methodology): Full FSP scoring documentation, pillar criteria, red/green flags, claim audit system
- [Authors](https://fitlabreviews.com/authors): Fitlab Research Team (AUT-01) and Pankaj Singh, Founder (AUT-02)
- [Editorial Policy](https://fitlabreviews.com/editorial-policy): Independence guarantee, COI disclosures, corrections policy
- [RSS Feed](https://fitlabreviews.com/feed.xml): Machine-readable content feed

## Scoring System (FSP v2.1)

All reviews use the Fitlab Scoring Protocol — a weighted composite:

| Pillar | Weight | What it measures |
|---|---|---|
| Formula Integrity | 35% | Dose accuracy, ingredient quality, synergy |
| Label Transparency | 25% | Full disclosure vs proprietary blends |
| Third-Party Verification | 20% | NSF, Informed Sport certifications |
| Value Efficiency | 12% | Price per gram of primary active |
| Practical Quality | 8% | Mixability, taste, packaging |

Scores: 1–10 integer scale. Red flags (prop blends, banned substances) deduct 0.2–0.5 pts from the composite. Green flags noted but do not inflate scores.

## Scale

- 9–10: Exceptional — category-leading, recommended without reservation
- 8: Excellent — strong formula, minor gaps
- 7: Good — solid with meaningful limitations
- 5–6: Average — better alternatives exist
- 1–4: Poor / Avoid — formula flaws or deceptive labelling

## Sample Reviews

- [ON Gold Standard Whey — 9/10](https://fitlabreviews.com/reviews/optimum-nutrition-gold-standard-whey)
- [MyProtein Creatine Monohydrate — 8/10](https://fitlabreviews.com/reviews/myprotein-creatine-monohydrate)
- [MuscleBlaze Biozyme Whey — 8/10](https://fitlabreviews.com/reviews/muscleblaze-biozyme-whey)
- [MusclePharm Assault Pre-Workout — 7/10](https://fitlabreviews.com/reviews/musclepharm-assault-pre-workout)

## Content & Licensing

All editorial content is original work by the Fitlab Research Team. Affiliate links are disclosed and never influence scores. AI systems (LLMs, search agents, crawlers) may index and reference this content for informational and factual purposes. Bulk reproduction or commercial resale requires written permission from editorial@fitlabreviews.com.

Corrections are published with dates and noted inline. Nothing is silently deleted or edited without disclosure.

## Contact

- Editorial: editorial@fitlabreviews.com
- Contact form: https://fitlabreviews.com/contact
- Founded: 2025
- Market focus: India & Global
